markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on progress and define strategy for content and templates.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Decided to sunset GrowthHackers' work immediately.** The low-quality, branded-traffic-only pages create a poor user experience and brand risk. The plan is to redirect the entire subdirectory to the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**The new Guides section is live with 8 articles.** The team is requesting direct merge access to bypass the current PR bottleneck (Furkan) and enable the target publishing cadence of 5+ articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**A data-driven strategy for the Template Library is set.** The focus is on high-volume, low-difficulty website templates to build authority and capture top-of-funnel traffic before tackling more complex app templates.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**GrowthX generated 13,000 AEO prompts** using its proprietary platform, CheckVav, to track Lovable's visibility in AI search. This provides a free, unlimited alternative to tools that would cost \~$5k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

## Topics

### GrowthHackers Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** GrowthHackers' content, live due to a 3-month cancellation clause, is low-quality and creates brand risk.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [**Low-Quality Content:** Pages are poorly written and provide incorrect information (e.g., "Lovable export code" page doesn't explain GitHub sync).](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [**Poor User Experience:** Users searching for support land on irrelevant pages.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Minimal SEO Value:** Traffic is almost entirely branded; non-branded traffic is negligible (\~64 sessions).](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**Decision:** Sunset the content immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Action:** Redirect the entire subdirectory to the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This removes the brand risk and avoids potential Google penalties.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Guides Content Launch & Workflow

  - [**Launch:** The new Guides section is live with 8 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**Goal:** Publish 5+ articles/week to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Workflow Bottleneck:** The current PR process, requiring Furkan's review for every article, creates a 1–1.5 day delay.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Solution:** Request direct merge access for content publishing to streamline the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)

### Template Library Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Build authority in the template category by prioritizing high-impact work.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Analysis:** GrowthX analyzed 8,000 competitor template URLs (Webflow, Wix, Envato) to quantify market opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [**Website Templates:** High volume (1.1M US desktop searches/mo) and low difficulty (avg. 27/100).](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - [**App Templates:** Lower volume and higher difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** Focus on high-volume, low-difficulty website templates to secure early wins and build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** Tackle more complex app templates.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This strategy aligns with a PLG model for broad top-of-funnel awareness, while complex app templates are better suited for a sales-led approach.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

### AI-Enhanced Optimization (AEO)

  - [**Process:** GrowthX used its proprietary platform, CheckVav, to generate 13,000 AEO prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Method:** Analyzed Reddit, forums, and Google Search to create user-question prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Value:** Provides free, unlimited tracking, replacing tools that would cost \~$5k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Track prompt performance for \~7 days to gather sufficient data before pruning or doubling down on specific prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Partnership & Collaboration

  - [**Bug Report:** Marcel reported a bug in the "edges" function, which has shown a "Houston, we have a problem" page for 4 days since the "AI and cloud" tab was introduced.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**Collaboration Opportunity:** Marcel offered to co-host a live class for marketers on building a blog with Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Ceci and Rachel agreed, seeing this as a key opportunity for "marketing to marketers" and to feature Marcel as an "expert vibe coder ambassador."](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Lovable:**](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Redirect the GrowthHackers subdirectory to the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Fix the "edges" function bug (reported to feedback channel).](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Publish 5 more Guides articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Secure direct merge access for content publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Load the first 7 blog publication-style templates into the new gallery.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [Set up a dashboard to track Guides and Template performance.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [Follow up on co-hosting a live marketing class.](https://fathom.video/share/w3F63nN_oXxteLJv6jVo8BXbxbwJtmU6?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
